hypothesis: In the CsPbI3 β→γ transition, fine-tuning the pretrained eSEN model on ≤200 DFT-labeled SSNEB images selected from those with the highest predicted virial stresses, using a loss with stress:force:energy weights ≥3:1:1, will reduce the subsequent VASP-SSNEB convergence iterations by ≥50% relative to the unfine-tuned eSEN+VASP-restart baseline while keeping the final DFT energy barrier within 0.02 eV of the VASP-only result.
